name: U S PHYSICAL THERAPY INC /NV
summary: PART I GENERAL U.S. Physical Therapy, Inc. through its subsidiaries (we, us, our, or the Company), operates its business through two reportable business segments. Our physical therapy operations segment consists of physical therapy, speech therapy and occupational therapy clinics and home-care physical and speech therapy practices that provide pre- and post-operative care and treatment for a variety of orthopedic-related disorders, sports-related injuries, and rehabilitation of injured workers. ...
